ip_outcome_note: Son Goku is the primary protagonist of Dragon Ball, Dragon Ball Z, and Dragon Ball Super. The card name 'Indomitable Dynasty SS Son Goku' directly names him. The vision description — spiky golden hair, orange and blue gi, crackling energy aura — is the definitive Super Saiyan visual signature associated with Goku throughout the franchise. ip_confidence already high, confirmed.

trivia_bullets.text: BT4-077 is an Uncommon Yellow Battle card at 3 cost with 15000 power. Its Swap 4 effect allows the player to pay 4 energy to swap it from play for a 'Goku's Lineage' card with cost 4 from hand. This enables the Goku's Lineage archetype's core loop of cycling weaker Goku forms into bigger ones — the card is a value chain enabler, not a standalone threat. [DBZ Exchange: BT4-077 card listing; TCGplayer listing]
sources: TCGplayer: Indomitable Dynasty SS Son Goku

trivia_bullets.text: Colossal Warfare introduced the Swap mechanic to the Dragon Ball Super Card Game — the ability to return a card to hand and immediately play a stronger card for less energy. Goku-type cards were among the primary beneficiaries of this mechanic, creating the 'Goku's Lineage' chain archetype that became a recurring deck structure across subsequent sets. [WebSearch: DBS BT4 Swap mechanic]
sources: WebSearch: Dragon Ball Super Colossal Warfare BT4 mechanics Swap King Piccolo archetype

trivia_bullets.text: BT4-077 is restricted to immunity from opponent card selection ('cannot be chosen by opponent's card skills'), giving it some protection on the field. At $0.04 market value it is among the lowest-priced uncommons in the set, indicating the Swap chain has been power-crept in later sets. [card frontmatter market_price; TCGplayer listing]
sources: TCGplayer: Indomitable Dynasty SS Son Goku
